title: Company Info
note: Provides Microchip's investor-relations description as a broadline semiconductor supplier focused on embedded control, analog, interface, security, and related product areas.

title: Form 10-K for fiscal year ended March 31, 2026
note: Primary source for fiscal 2026 revenue, gross margin, customer and distributor concentration, geography, manufacturing, R&D, and business-risk context.

title: 8-bit PIC and AVR MCUs
note: Product source for the PIC and AVR MCU families, including Microchip's claims about tooling, robust design, and long product lifecycles.

title: Microchip Technology (MCHP) - Market capitalization
note: Used for the May 2026 market capitalization refresh and historical market-cap context.

title: Microchip Technology (MCHP) - P/E ratio
note: Used for the trailing P/E ratio snapshot, with caution because recent trailing earnings make the metric volatile and less representative of normalized semiconductor-cycle profitability.

title: Ibex CPU
note: Documents Ibex as an Apache-2.0 open-source, configurable RISC-V embedded processor core and provides readiness context for open MCU alternatives.

title: Open source silicon root of trust
note: Documents OpenTitan's open-source, vendor-agnostic silicon root-of-trust model and community-governed transparency thesis.

title: CHIPS Alliance Welcomes the Caliptra Open Source Root of Trust Project
note: Supports the Caliptra alternative and auditable hardware-security concept, including CHIPS Alliance governance and open RTL/firmware/verification claims.

title: OpenROAD documentation
note: Documents the open RTL-to-GDSII toolchain used as an enabling primitive for open silicon and community ASIC concepts.

title: Submitting a chipIgnite Project
note: Documents a shuttle-style path for open-source chip projects using an open chip framework and precheck tooling, relevant to small-batch silicon coordination.
